title: Dragoste la tara
overview: Ana, a city girl, raised in comfort, has managed to upset her father. In order to learn some humility and appreciate life in its simplicity, Ana is "exiled" to the countryside, to live with her grandmother for a while. For Ana, life in the village is a nightmare: heels sink into the mud, internet not so much, and people are strange.
